chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 1040 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 22-08-2023 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for petitioner. M/s Mujeeb Rehman Soomro and Bahawal Din Shaikh, SPPs, NAB. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, D.A.G. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General. ***** Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that grievance of the petitioner is that he had applied for Foti Khata Badal and issuance of certified true copy of entry No.303, but the Mukhtiarkar concerned stated that entire entry book of Form-II has been produced and exhibited in Reference No.06 of 2015, which has already ended in conviction and sentence of the accused and Crl. Accountability Appeal No.D-106 of 2018 against which is pending before this Court. Learned counsel submits that in case it is considered that after keeping certified copy of the relevant entry in dispute in the above said Reference, the original book is returned to Mukhtiarkar so that his application could be decided on merits, he would be satisfied and will not press this petition and however, he would file a relevant application for the said purpose in the aforesaid Appeal for a relief, as stated by him in the Court, today. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of as not pressed leaving the petitioner to file application in the aforesaid Appeal for decision in accordance with law. Petition stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
